title: Calgara Draws His Spear
description: Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Calgara, Musse, Mont Blanc Noland, Shandia villager, Enel. Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: All your human sacrifices are mean- inglass...

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: Don't talk as if you know anything!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: But human lives... are far more sacred!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: The pantort's words are god's words.

dialogue.speaker: Musse
dialogue.text: Take the sacrifices up to the altar!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Burn them up to the heavens!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Admiraal! We're gonna be burnt alive!

summary: Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.
